roa.docketEntryComment: Order Designating Arrest as Detention Only Pursuant to Penal Code 849.5
DEFT'S MOTION TO CORRECT CRIMINAL HISTORY UNDER PC 849,5 & 851,6 FILED

/CAL: DEFENDANT'S PC849,5 AND 851,6 MOTION TO CORRECT CRIMINAL HISTORY/NP//X: NOT REPORTED/X: INCIDENT DATE MAY 12, 2020/CTORD: SAN FRANCISCO POLICE REPORT INCIDENT NUMBER 200291168 DATED 05-12-2020 IS DEEMED A DETENTION ONLY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 849,5/CTORD: THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT AND THE ATTORNEY GENERAL SHALL REQUEST THE DELETION OF ANY REFERENCE TO AN ARREST IN ANY ARREST RECORDS WHICH THEY HAVE GIVEN TO ANY LOCAL, STATE ORFEDERAL AGENCY WITHIN THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA SHALL DEEM THIS ACTION A DETENTION ONLY,/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED,
